# Q 

2 

M 

IRON WHEELCLEANER REDEFINED

## Exterior / maintenance

### Strong and effective dedicated wheel cleaner

Q²M Iron WheelCleaner REDEFINED is a dedicated wheel cleaner designed to remove grime, dirt and brake dust from all types of wheels and finishes. Its gel based formula clings strongly to the surface, allowing effective cleaning while remaining safe for coated and uncoated rims.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/productmain_1700x1645px_q2m_iron-wheel-cleaner_1000_500_2023-1024x991.png)

[Technical Details](#technical-details)

## Effective wheel cleaner with increased brake dust removal functionality.

Q²M Iron WheelCleaner REDEFINED combines strong wheel cleaning power with the ability to remove ferrous contamination. It simplifies wheel maintenance by dissolving brake dust and embedded particles without damaging delicate finishes.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons39.svg)

LOW ODOUR 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons54.svg)

INSTANT ACTION 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons74.svg)

SUITABLE FOR ALL WHEELS 

what makes

Q2M IRON WHEELCLEANER REDEFINED so special? 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2023/12/ironwheelcleaner-1-683x1024.jpg)

Removes brake dust and heavy wheel contamination

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2023/12/ironwheelcleaner-4-683x1024.jpg)

Gel formula clings to surfaces for effective cleaning

## TECHNICAL DETAILS

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/860x640q2mironwheelcleanerredefined.webp)

CAPACITIES 

500 ML / 1000 ML / 4000 ML

PH LEVEL

NEUTRAL

Consumption

100ml/car

## HOW TO USE

Q 

2 

M 

IRON WHEELCLEANER REDEFINED

01
Spray Q²M Iron WheelCleaner REDEFINED onto cool wheels. 

02
Allow the product to dwell and react with contamination. 

03
Agitate gently with a brush if needed. 

04
Rinse thoroughly with water. 

05
Do not allow the product to dry on the surface. 

### Watch
product
video

## FREQUENTLY ASKED
QUESTIONS

01
Is Q²M Iron WheelCleaner REDEFINED safe for ceramic coated wheels? 

Yes. It is safe for coated and uncoated wheels.

02
Does it remove iron contamination? 

Yes. It removes ferrous deposits while cleaning wheels.

03
Can it be used on all wheel finishes? 

Yes. It is safe for all common wheel types.

04
Does it need agitation? 

Light agitation helps with heavy contamination.

05
Is it suitable for regular maintenance? 

Yes. It is suitable for routine wheel cleaning.

[FIND MORE ANSWERS](https://gyeon.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/sections/5741200835857-Q-M-Iron-WheelCleaner)

## Recommended Pairing

We recommend complementary products that perfectly match your current one, creating a complete and convenient KIT. Together, they deliver the best performance and a seamless user experience.
